judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered German patents granted in H2 2019 correctly, but its SQL did not select the filing_date and the subsequent Python fell back to publication_date/grant_date for the year (see query without filing_date and code using fallback), so it computed EMAs on the wrong date attribute, yielding incorrect best years and CPC rankings.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing steps (call_ZtNelFQA3ml6RcU2I1G2nXFl), the agent filtered “Germany” by regex on the unstructured Patents_info text (country_re = r'\bDE\b|Germany') and extracted CPC groups accordingly, which led to selecting only five groups (including Y02) and missing many German CPC classes expected in the ground truth—an error of wrong data selection rather than planning.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered “Germany” by searching for the word “germany” in the free-text Patents_info field (SQL call call_Mg8jcZD7OFnFitGEUSuW0mxV and again in execute_python call_tl2SP0jMzhYsDjYuPokA6FGq), rather than using the actual country code/jurisdiction, leading to the wrong patent set and thus incorrect CPC groups and best years.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed EMAs on the wrong subset of records because its Germany filter (call_93nbrQx7BQWZpY6lcR3aUu1W) used crude Patents_info LIKE patterns (e.g., '%Germany%','DE-') that both included non‑German items (e.g., a CA record with "TE CONNECTIVITY GERMANY GMBH" seen in call_xX74RHwlq6mRafTkCdKrrQEg) and missed valid German patents, and then used this flawed set in call_7C2OhHGCWF8pWWzp9yNQO8k0 to derive top groups, leading to incorrect best years and an incomplete list.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@
